title: Social Media Marketing Strategy
content: A successful social media strategy requires: 1) Platform selection based on target audience demographics; 2) Content calendar planning for consistent posting; 3) Engagement tactics to build community; 4) Analytics tracking to measure performance. Key metrics include engagement rate, follower growth, and content reach. Best practices: respond to comments within 24 hours, use hashtags strategically, and maintain brand voice consistency.
content_zh: 成功的社交媒体策略需要：1) 根据目标受众特征选择平台；2) 规划内容日历以保持一致发布；3) 互动策略建立社区；4) 分析跟踪以衡量绩效。关键指标包括互动率、粉丝增长和内容触达。最佳实践：24小时内回复评论、战略性地使用标签、保持品牌声音一致性。
